chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1527 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6026/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he has been instructed by the latter not to press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
